title: GSAP ScrollTrigger
description: Minimal two-row layout demonstrating smooth scroll-tied text and box reveal using GSAP ScrollTrigger with scrub smoothing. Clean, dependency-lite, and ready to embed.

title: Infinite 3D Stacked Scroll Slider
description: This project is a high-performance, infinite carousel component that utilizes a "deck of cards" UI pattern. It features a custom scroll-jacking mechanism where user scroll (mouse wheel) and touch swipes trigger complex 3D animations rather than moving a traditional browser scrollbar.
